use_cases: Displaying client logos or partner logos in a continuously scrolling banner
Showing testimonials in an animated horizontal or vertical strip
Featuring product images or categories in an auto-scrolling carousel
Creating attention-grabbing announcement banners with continuous motion
Displaying skill tags or technology badges in a scrolling showcase
ai_summary: A configurable infinite marquee slider component that continuously scrolls content horizontally or vertically with adjustable speed, gap, and direction settings. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and react-use-measure for responsive dimension tracking, making it ideal for showcasing logos, testimonials, featured items, or any repeating content in an engaging animated format.
